milestone.title: Amazing! {days}-day healthy logging streak
milestone.body: Gorilla coach salutes your discipline! You're ahead of 90% of members on a cut — keep it up!

notifications.logMeal: ⏰ Time to log your last meal — don't miss a check-in!
notifications.hydration: Hydration reminder: drink a big glass of water now!

errors.cloudLoadFailed: Cloud load failed. Check your network or Supabase.

targets.lockedBanner: {source} locked targets: {calories} kcal · Protein {protein}g · Carbs {carbs}g · Fat {fats}g

home.soloModeBanner: You're in AI private-coach mode — Gorilla auto-reviews every meal you log!

aiCoach.soloJoined: You joined [{gym}] solo plan. Today {status} — follow the AI mandate!
aiCoach.coachJoined: You're linked to [{gym}], coach [{coach}]. Today {status} — follow [{mealSchedule}]!

weight.title: Weight trend
weight.invalidAlert: Please enter a valid weight (30–300 kg)
weight.saveFailed:
Failed to save weight: {message}

Run phase5-weight-logs.sql in Supabase.

addMeal.title: Log Meal
addMeal.uploadPhotoHint: Tap to take or choose a photo (auto-compressed under 1MB)
addMeal.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. char siu ramen, fried noodles...
addMeal.quickPortionHint: AI adjusts hidden calories for dining out (broth, chili oil, cooking oil)
addMeal.autoEstimateHint: Calories and macros are estimated automatically when you save

errors.loginRequired: Please log in before logging a meal.
errors.compressFailed: Photo compression failed. Try a smaller image.

foodSearch.title: Food Search
foodSearch.hint: Type partial keywords (typos, EN/ZH mix OK) — AI suggests HK & Taiwan foods with estimated macros
foodSearch.notFound: No matching foods. Try another keyword.
foodSearch.noResultsDropdown: No matching foods. Try a different keyword.
foodSearch.typeToSearch: Type at least 2 characters to search
foodSearch.addedHint: Added to form — tap Publish Log to save
foodSearch.loginRequired: Please log in to search foods
foodSearch.fatSecretIpBlocked: FatSecret blocked this server IP. Add it in FatSecret Platform → your app → IP allowlist. On Vercel, enable Static IPs under Project Settings → Connectivity.
foodSearch.sheetHint: Pick a food to log instantly. For photos or full options, use the full log page.

advanced.title: Advanced Nutrition
advanced.disclaimer: Advanced nutrients are AI-estimated or derived from macros. Pro reference only—not medical advice.

welcome.login: Welcome back! Log in to continue tracking meals and AI analysis.
welcome.solo: No coach needed — Gorilla AI will set your targets and review every meal.
welcome.coach: Open your gym brand space and start managing student nutrition.

signup.soloTitle: Sign up for AI private coach (no human coach required)
signup.soloHint: Password required · Auto-connects to official AI tenant · Gorilla manages targets and reviews

invite.show: I have a coach invite code (optional)
invite.placeholder: Enter coach invite code (leave blank if none)

errors.passwordMin: Please set a password with at least 6 characters.
errors.network: Connection failed. Please try again later.
errors.networkRetry: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.

toast.soloReady: Welcome! Gorilla AI coach is ready for onboarding.

settings.title: Personal settings
settings.nicknamePlaceholder: What should your coach call you?
settings.morningReminderHint: Each day at your chosen time, get a lock-screen nudge to hydrate and log meals (enable push below).
settings.bodySyncFailed: Body data sync failed; local settings were saved.

roast.empty: Haven't eaten yet? Don't starve — log what you had!
roast.overCalHigh: That much fried noodles won't help fat loss — try less oil and salt tomorrow!
roast.overCalMild: A bit indulgent today — watch café traps and skip the extra milk tea!
roast.underCal: Eating too little? Don't under-fuel — get enough protein!
roast.lowProtein: Protein's low — add chicken breast or eggs, not just carbs!
roast.excellent: Great eating today! Keep it up — your coach would smile!
roast.good: Solid effort — watch fat and sodium and you're golden!

header.title: Build your body profile
header.subtitleSolo: Gorilla AI will generate calorie and macro targets from your data.
header.subtitleCoach: Complete this to enter the app so AI can estimate dining-out calories and daily targets.

errors.invalidFields: Please enter valid height, weight, age, and target weight.
errors.permission: Permission check failed — log out and sign in again as a student.
errors.saveFailed: Save failed. Please try again later.

warnings.bypassSaved: Saved body profile via fallback (cloud may sync later).
warnings.aiTargetsFailed: Body profile saved, but AI mandate failed: {error}
warnings.aiTargetsRetry: Body profile saved; AI mandate will retry later.

push.title: Meal & hydration reminders
push.description: Get system notifications even when the app is closed (requires VAPID + Supabase subscription storage).

unsupported.title: System notifications
unsupported.hint: Web Push isn't supported here. On iPhone, use Safari Add to Home Screen, then open from the icon (iOS 16.4+).

denied.help: Notifications were blocked. Go to Settings → Safari/Chrome → Notifications → allow Nutrition Coach.

messages.enabled: Notifications on; subscription saved to Supabase.
messages.enabledConsole: Notifications on. Supabase table missing — subscription logged to Console (F12).
messages.testSent: Local test notification sent (check system settings if nothing appears).

coachPush.title: Instant meal-log alerts
coachPush.description: Get system notifications when a student logs a meal, even if the app is in the background.
coachPush.unsupportedHint: Web Push isn't supported here. Use Chrome/Safari; on iPhone, Add to Home Screen first (iOS 16.4+).
coachPush.enabled: Push enabled! You'll be notified when students log meals.
coachPush.testOk: Local test sent (use /api/push/test for server push).
coachPush.deniedHelp: Notifications were blocked. Allow this site in browser/system settings.

micro.title: Micronutrients
micro.disclaimer: * Micronutrients estimated from today's intake — reference only
